D4762.source_pdf: D4762 Oversized CURVED HEM BF 000790512 Concept-en.pdf, page 8

callouts.construction: 2 PLY COLLAR: INSIDE COLLAR STAND W/EDGESTITCH, 1/16" AT TOP AND BOTTOM
Back yoke seam: felled seam w/1/4" SNTS
Cuff: SN edgestitch all around, 2NTS 3/8" margin at attach seam
1 PKT at chest SNES, opening hem 2 rows and 3/16 DNTS
BOTTOM HEM: turn and turn with SNTS
Sleeve placket: 1N edgestitch except the outer edge
Please follow Gap Inc construction standards for Wovens
White dot CC: Neck/Keyhole/Armhole/Bottom hem 1/4" contrast binding, SNT
Black dot CC: Neck/Keyhole/Armhole 1/4" contrast binding, SNT
1/4" bottom hem height, clean finish turnback SNT
Smocking at shoulder: 3 rows 3/8", 3/4" spacing in between smocking rows. Start 3/4" from shoulder seam
FUNNEL NECK COLLAR IN FLAT KNIT RIB
EXPLORING WOVEN PLACET, WILL REQUEST COST OPTION WITH FLAT KNIT RIB PLACKET, PLACKET WIDTH 1"

D89572.notes: No explicit armhole, shoulder, or side seam callout on this page

D75816.design: Fitted HR STUDIO SMOOTH FOLD OVER WAISTBAND

callouts.construction: ALL SEAMS FINISHED WITH PEARL MERROW

SIDE WAIST PANEL EXTENDS FROM WAIST UNDER MAIN BODY FABRIC TO CREATE POCKET BAG. POCKET OPENING CLEAN FINISHED TO INTERNAL POCKET BAG. BARTACK AT STRESS POINTS. POCKET BAG IS CAUGHT ON EACH SIDE BY COVERSTITCH.
POCKET BAG IS FOLDED AND FLOATING ALONG BOTTOM EDGE

D75816.notes: PLEASE REFERENCE D34568 FOR OVERALL BODY construction. Pearl merrow = overlock variant.

D88814.notes: TD NOTES from text on right side. No ISO or stitch type specified - this is a Concept stage callout focused on design features not construction.

callouts.construction: FLAT KNIT RIB NECKLINE FINISHED TO BODY W/ 1/16 SNTS MARGIN
SHOULDER FINISHED WITH C/S TAPING W/ 1 NDL DNTS
SHOULDER PANEL PIECE IS CENTERED OVER NATURAL SHOULDER SEAM THEN FINISHED TO BODY WITH 1/16 SNTS MARGIN
FLAT KNIT RIB SLEEVE BAND, CLEAN OPENING
1 1/4" SIDE SEAM UP FINISHED WITH 1/16 SNTS. BARTACK AT TOP
1" TURNBACK HEM ON RIB AND SLEEVE OPENING
3/8 OG SMOCKING PANEL DOWN BOTH FULL SIDES OF BODY 3" WIDE. 1/4" ENCASED ELASTIC @ TOP OF EACH SMOCKING PANEL. SMOCK PANEL FINISHED WITH 1/4" INTERIOR BINDING

D51259.notes: Concept stage - design features only, no stitch type specified
